title: Entra ID / Conditional Access lockout
safe_steps: Check whether break-glass/admin account is safe.
Do not disable security broadly without approval.
advanced_steps: Review sign-in logs, CA report-only mode, policy changes, device compliance, named locations.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
